hooks.command: if [ -f context/progress-tracker.md ]; then printf '%s\n' '[Six-File Context] This project uses the Six-File Context Methodology. Before implementing or making any architectural decision, read the entry point (CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md) and the files in context/ in order. Honor the invariants in context/architecture.md and the rules in context/ai-workflow-rules.md. Current project state from context/progress-tracker.md:'; cat context/progress-tracker.md; fi

hooks.prompt: Act only if BOTH are true: (1) the project has a context/ folder, and (2) the user's message is a substantive build, feature, or implementation request. For short acknowledgments, casual chat, simple questions, or one-line fixes, output nothing. When you do act, DO NOT rewrite or replace the user's message. Only ADD a short context note: point to the relevant context file, spec, or build unit the request touches, and if the request is materially vague (missing goal, scope, or acceptance), add one suggested sharper phrasing prefixed 'Suggested:' for the user to confirm. Never change the user's intent. Keep the addition to a few lines.

A context/architecture.md and/or context/code-standards.md file may define this project's invariants and coding standards. If those files exist, evaluate whether this file change clearly violates a stated invariant or standard. Tool input: $TOOL_INPUT. If it clearly violates a documented rule, block and name the specific rule plus how to comply. If it complies, or no context files exist, or this is a change to the context files themselves, approve without comment.

If this response implemented, modified, or deleted code in a project that has a context/ folder, verify that context/progress-tracker.md reflects the change. If it does not, update progress-tracker.md (Completed, In Progress, Next Up) to match what was just done, and keep the 'Session Notes' section ending with a current dated 'Resume here:' line stating the clear next step. If the project has no context/ folder, or no code changed in this response, do nothing.
